jobs.title: Luxury Spa Supervisor (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Luxury Spa Supervisor (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-09.

## This is what you move with us
Providing high-quality facials, manicures and pedicures (including gel colour polish with OPI) at Swiss deluxe level.
Performing classic and signature massages – ideally including Lomi Lomi, Thai or hot stone.
Helping to create an unforgettable spa experience: providing personal advice to our guests, actively selling exclusive products and treatments.
Supporting the spa manager in administrative tasks, team coordination and daily operations
Assisting with quality assurance and monitoring order and hygiene throughout the spa, pool and fitness areas
Representing our spa concept with a warm welcome and a sense of style – always with a smile

## This is you
Completed training as a beautician and masseuse and at least 2 years of professional experience in a high-end spa environment.
Very good knowledge of manicures/pedicures, massages and beauty treatments – including confident working with high-quality products and techniques.
Host mentality with a sense of aesthetics, discretion and excellent understanding of service.
Fluent German and very good English skills – any additional languages are a plus.
Organisational skills, sales talent and enjoyment of working in a luxury hotel at a 5-star superior level.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. 
• We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usCreating Perfect Pool Moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna areas, keeping a keen eye on every detail.A Heartfelt Host: You welcome our guests with a smile and provide attentive service throughout the entire SPA and pool area.Hygiene at the Highest Level: You guarantee cleanliness and order across the SPA and perform daily quality controls.Crafting Moments of Well-being: With your additional qualifications in sauna infusions (Aufgüsse), aqua gym, and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to the relaxation experience and the joy of being in the water.
This is youProfessional Qualification: Completed vocational training as a Lifeguard, Specialist for Pool Operations (Fachangestellte/r für Bäderbetriebe), or an equivalent qualification.Relevant Experience: Proven experience in pool operations and water supervision, as well as in conducting sauna infusions and swimming lessons.Certifications: Ideally, you hold the Brevet Plus Pool (SLRG) and have sound knowledge of First Aid and BLS-AED.Language Skills: Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.Personality: An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of safety, service, and hospitality.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. 
• We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%

This is youCompleted training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa.

Creating Perfect Pool Moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna areas, keeping a keen eye on every detail.
A Heartfelt Host: You welcome our guests with a smile and provide attentive service throughout the entire SPA and pool area.
Hygiene at the Highest Level: You guarantee cleanliness and order across the SPA and perform daily quality controls.
Crafting Moments of Well-being: With your additional qualifications in sauna infusions (Aufgüsse), aqua gym, and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to the relaxation experience and the joy of being in the water.

Professional Qualification: Completed vocational training as a Lifeguard, Specialist for Pool Operations (Fachangestellte/r für Bäderbetriebe), or an equivalent qualification.
Relevant Experience: Proven experience in pool operations and water supervision, as well as in conducting sauna infusions and swimming lessons.
Certifications: Ideally, you hold the Brevet Plus Pool (SLRG) and have sound knowledge of First Aid and BLS-AED.
Language Skills: Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.
Personality: An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of safety, service, and hospitality.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Guardia di vita (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. # Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Creare momenti di piscina perfetti: Garantisci operazioni fluide nella piscina e nella zona sauna mantenendo ogni dettaglio in vista. Un ospite a cuore: con un sorriso caldo, accogliete i nostri ospiti e badate a loro attentamente in tutta la zona spa e piscina. Igiene al massimo livello: Mantenete la pulizia e l'ordine in tutto il centro benessere e fate controlli di qualità giornalieri. Momenti di benessere: con le tue competenze aggiuntive in infusioni di sauna, palestra di acqua e lezioni di nuoto per i nostri ospiti più piccoli, contribuisci attivamente alla loro esperienza di relax e gioia in acqua. # Questo è il titolare del “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) con solida conoscenza di pronto soccorso. Esperienza nelle operazioni in piscina e competenze nella conduzione di infusioni di sauna, palestra acqua e lezioni di nuoto per i bambini. Eccellente tedesco e inglese competenze; lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio. Una personalità attenta e calorosa con un forte senso di servizio e quella speciale cosa che delizia gli ospiti. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo.
• Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. Applicare ora ## Fiorista (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che si muove con noiRisponsabile per tutte le composizioni floreali nel nostro hotel, tra cui la creazione di pezzi centrali, mazzi di fiori, ecc. Decorare spazi pubblici non solo per uso quotidiano ma anche per occasioni speciali come feste, eventi di gala, funzioni private, ecc. Organizzazione e consulenza su paesaggi esterni Cura corretta di fiori e piante verdi Approvvigionamento di tutti i fiori, le piante e i materiali Sviluppo e implementazione del concetto, aderendo al bilancio specificato Questo è il tuo Hai completato con successo la formazione in fioristi e hanno diversi anni di esperienza (preferibilmente nel settore alberghiero) Con un tocco creativo, sai come deliziare i nostri ospiti con le tue decorazioni floreali e creare un'atmosfera impressionante e un'atmosfera unica dentro e fuori il nostro hotel di lusso Sei flessibile, apprezzi la buona comunicazione, e sono abituati a lavorare indipendentemente. Anche sotto pressione, si rimane composti e calmi, e si dispone di un demeanor naturale e amichevole verso gli ospiti e colleghi. Lingue: Inglese o Tedesco Vantaggi A Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo.
• Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Fiorista (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% Persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno plasmando il Luxury Mountain Travel. Come la mano destra al nostro fiorista capo, si giocherà un ruolo chiave nel trasformare il nostro hotel in un capolavoro fiorente. Sei più di un fiorista – sei un ambasciatore di estetica ed eleganza. La vostra missione: Creative Staging: Prenderai un ruolo di primo piano nell'intero design floreale—dall'allestimento di tavoli delicati a grandi mazzi imponenti per le nostre suite più esclusive. Eventi: Mostra le tue abilità nel design floreale su larga scala durante matrimoni glamour, serate di gala, e grandi progetti stagionali (come il nostro leggendario Natale e New Year's Eve decorazioni). Perfezione in dettaglio: Si garantisce un aspetto costantemente impeccabile di tutti gli arrangiamenti e piante verdi, sia all'interno che all'esterno. Assumere la responsabilità: Sostiene il capo reparto in modo operativo, coordina le consegne di fiori, e assicurarsi che i nostri standard di alta qualità sono sentiti in ogni singolo accordo. Data di inizio: 1 giugno, 2026 Questo e' il tuo libro. Hai una formazione professionale completa come fiorista e esperienza professionale iniziale nel settore. Passione creativa: Hai un occhio affilato per colori, forme e tendenze attuali. Il vostro obiettivo è quello di creare un'atmosfera "migliorante" per i nostri ospiti internazionali. Composure: Anche durante eventi importanti e periodi ad alto volume, si lavora con precisione ed efficienza, mantenendo sempre un occhio per i minimi dettagli. Personalità: Il tuo aspetto è lucido come il tuo lavoro floreale. Sei un comunicatore proattivo all'interno del team e un punto di contatto caldo per i nostri ospiti. Lingue: Siete in grado di comunicare efficacemente in tedesco o in inglese. Perché il gruppo Kulm? Vi offriamo un palcoscenico per la vostra creatività in una delle posizioni più esclusive del mondo. Diventa parte di un team che valorizza la vera artigianalità, incoraggia l'iniziativa e prospera in una cultura del rispetto reciproco e dello spirito di squadra. Sei pronto a far fiorire il Kulm? Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la vostra applicazione! BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo.

E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è quello che ti muovi con noiPamper i nostri ospiti con trattamenti termali professionali come massaggi sportivi, massaggi firma, scrub corpo, avvolge e bagni. Con il vostro senso per le esigenze individuali, si consiglia ai nostri ospiti sui servizi spa e prodotti per la cura della pelle di alta qualità. Fornire esperienze di benessere indimenticabili attraverso la cura di prima classe e il servizio attento. Sostenere il team spa alla reception con la pianificazione degli appuntamenti, assicurando operazioni fluide. Utilizza il tuo flair di vendita per consigliare i prodotti di assistenza domestica adatti, aumentando le entrate termiche. Assicurare i più elevati standard di igiene e sicurezza in tutto il centro benessere e fitness. Questa è la formazione completa come massaggiatore o una qualifica simile nel campo spa e benessere. Ulteriori certificazioni (ad esempio, massaggio tailandese, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, riflessologia, drenaggio linfatico) sono un vantaggio. Idealmente, esperienza in corsi di fitness come yoga o Pilates. Esperienza dimostrata nel settore spa, preferibilmente nell'ospitalità di lusso. Eccellente capacità di comunicazione in tedesco e inglese e una sensibilità ai desideri dei nostri ospiti. Flessibilità di lavorare fine settimana, vacanze e eventi speciali come il nostro Night Spa. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo.

Agent de piscine / Sauveteur (h/f/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadine, Grisons). Temps de travail : 100%. Contrat : poste de 10 mois. Date de début : 1 juin 2026. ## Ce que vous réalisez avec nous Créer des moments parfaits à la piscine : vous assurez le bon fonctionnement de la zone piscine et sauna tout en veillant à chaque détail. Hôte de cœur : avec un sourire chaleureux, vous accueillez nos invités et les accompagnez attentivement tout au long de leur expérience spa et piscine. Hygiène au plus haut niveau : vous maintenez la propreté et l’ordre dans tout le spa et effectuez des contrôles de qualité quotidiens. Créer des instants de bien-être : grâce à vos compétences supplémentaires en infusions de sauna, aqua gym et cours de natation pour nos jeunes invités, vous contribuez activement à leur relaxation et leur plaisir dans l’eau. ## Vous êtes Titulaire du « Brevet Plus Pool » (SLRG) avec de solides connaissances en premiers secours. Expérience dans la gestion de piscine ainsi que compétences en infusions de sauna, aqua gym et cours de natation pour enfants. Excellentes compétences en allemand et en anglais ; d’autres langues sont un avantage. Personnalité attentive, chaleureuse, avec un fort sens du service et ce petit quelque chose qui enchante nos invités. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès.

En tant que membre du groupe de luxe Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et à ce titre, nous incarnons notre culture : luxe discret, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, faisons en sorte que cela devienne réalité. Voici votre chance de rejoindre notre culture de création : Ce que vous apportez avec nous Responsable de tous les arrangements floraux dans notre hôtel, y compris la création de centres de table, bouquets, etc. Décoration des espaces publics non seulement pour un usage quotidien mais aussi pour des occasions spéciales telles que fêtes, galas, événements privés, etc. Organisation et conseil en aménagement paysager extérieur Soins des fleurs et des plantes vertes Approvisionnement en fleurs, plantes et matériaux Développement et mise en œuvre de concepts en respectant le budget fixé ## Vous êtes Vous avez suivi une formation en floristique et disposez de plusieurs années d’expérience (de préférence dans l’hôtellerie). Avec un sens créatif, vous savez comment ravir nos invités avec vos décorations florales et créer une atmosphère impressionnante et une ambiance unique à l’intérieur comme à l’extérieur de notre hôtel de luxe. Vous êtes flexible, appréciez une bonne communication et êtes habitué à travailler de manière autonome. Même sous pression, vous restez calme et efficace, avec une attitude naturelle et amicale envers les invités et collègues. Langues : allemand ou anglais Pourquoi rejoindre le groupe Kulm ? Nous vous offrons une plateforme pour votre créativité dans l’un des endroits les plus exclusifs au monde. Faites partie d’une équipe qui valorise le véritable artisanat, encourage l’initiative et prospère dans une culture de respect mutuel et d’esprit d’équipe. Êtes-vous prêt à faire fleurir le Kulm ? Nous avons hâte de recevoir votre candidature ! Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès.

Avec votre sensibilité aux besoins individuels, conseillez nos invités sur les services spa et les produits de soin de haute qualité. Offrez des expériences de bien-être inoubliables grâce à des soins de première classe et un service attentif. Soutenez l’équipe spa à la réception dans la planification des rendez-vous, en assurant un fonctionnement fluide. Transporting guest luggage during arrival and departure
Cleaning rooms and suites as well as public areas
Performing errands and snow removal in winter

Professional experience in a similar position in luxury hotels
Reliability and discretion
Passion for service and enjoyment of teamwork
Must have: good German or English skills, ideally additional languages
Well-groomed appearance

This is youCompleted training as a beautician and masseuse and at least 2 years of professional experience in a high-end spa environment.Very good knowledge of manicures/pedicures, massages and beauty treatments – including confident working with high-quality products and techniques.Host mentality with a sense of aesthetics, discretion and excellent understanding of service.Fluent German and very good English skills – any additional languages are a plus.Organisational skills, sales talent and enjoyment of working in a luxury hotel at a 5-star superior level.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. 
• We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Assistant Front Office Manager (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. This is what you move with usLeadership & Partnership: You confidently represent the Front Office Manager and work together to ensure seamless operations at the highest level.The Guest Journey: From a warm welcome to a smooth check-out, you ensure our guests' stay is truly unforgettable.Knowledge Sharing: You contribute your expertise through staff training and performance reviews, while maintaining clear and professional communication with all other departments.Point of Contact: You serve as the primary contact for our guests—competent, proactive, and solution-oriented at all times.Administrative Excellence: You are responsible for statistics and month-end closings, ensuring strict adherence to LHW, Forbes, and Kulm standards.Guest Experience: With your profound knowledge of the hotel and the local region, you inspire our guests and guarantee a unique, world-class experience.
This is youEducation & Experience: You hold a degree in hospitality or business, with at least 3 years of experience in the 5-star luxury hotel segment.Leadership Skills: You possess proven leadership experience and a genuine passion for delivering exceptional service.Personality: You have a sophisticated appearance, a true host’s heart, and find joy in personal guest interaction.Languages: Must-have: Native or bilingual fluency in German and excellent English. Additional languages are a distinct advantage.Start Date: Available from June; we offer both 10-month seasonal or permanent year-round positions.

## Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIn this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%).
This is youFoundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.Why the Kulm Group? 
• We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. 
• We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## This is what you move with us
Competently handle reservations for individual and group guests as the first point of contact, ensuring the highest level of professionalism and proactive attention to detail 
  Maintain and update guest databases with the utmost accuracy, contributing significantly to guest satisfaction and loyalty 
  Address and resolve guest complaints promptly and with sensitivity, always finding the most suitable solution in a discreet and efficient manner 
  Manage multichannel communication, responding to all incoming enquiries by phone and email 
  Coordinate with other departments to ensure optimal alignment between room and event occupancy and our F&B and Spa offerings 
  Support the Reservations Manager with administrative tasks, ensure adherence to our high standards, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our products

## This is you
Charisma and friendliness with a natural warmth and refined manners, combined with a keen sense for the needs of discerning guests 
  Team spirit and flexibility, with excellent communication skills and the ability to adapt in a dynamic work environment 
  Experience in luxury hospitality, with completed vocational training and at least two years of experience in a 5-star hotel in Front Office or Reservations 
  Strong language skills in German and English (written and spoken); additional languages such as Italian are an advantage 
  Technical proficiency in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook, as well as experience managing online booking channels 
  Exceptional organisational skills and customer focus, ensuring precise planning, discreet guest relations, and outstanding service delivery

At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success.

            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. 
• We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Reservations Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. ## This is what you move with us Competently handle reservations for individual and group guests as the first point of contact, ensuring the highest level of professionalism and proactive attention to detail Maintain and update guest databases with the utmost accuracy, contributing significantly to guest satisfaction and loyalty Address and resolve guest complaints promptly and with sensitivity, always finding the most suitable solution in a discreet and efficient manner Manage multichannel communication, responding to all incoming enquiries by phone and email Coordinate with other departments to ensure optimal alignment between room and event occupancy and our F&B and Spa offerings Support the Reservations Manager with administrative tasks, ensure adherence to our high standards, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our products ## This is you Charisma and friendliness with a natural warmth and refined manners, combined with a keen sense for the needs of discerning guests Team spirit and flexibility, with excellent communication skills and the ability to adapt in a dynamic work environment Experience in luxury hospitality, with completed vocational training and at least two years of experience in a 5-star hotel in Front Office or Reservations Strong language skills in German and English (written and spoken); additional languages such as Italian are an advantage Technical proficiency in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook, as well as experience managing online booking channels Exceptional organisational skills and customer focus, ensuring precise planning, discreet guest relations, and outstanding service delivery ## Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success.
• We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. This is youEducation & Experience: You hold a degree in hospitality or business, with at least 3 years of experience in the 5-star luxury hotel segment.Leadership Skills: You possess proven leadership experience and a genuine passion for delivering exceptional service.Personality: You have a sophisticated appearance, a true host’s heart, and find joy in personal guest interaction.Languages: Must-have: Native or bilingual fluency in German and excellent English. Additional languages are a distinct advantage.Start Date: Available from June; we offer both 10-month seasonal or permanent year-round positions. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success.
• We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration. This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience. Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales. Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus. Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm. Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success.

jobs.title: Spa Therapist (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Spa Therapist (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Pamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.
With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.

Come la mano destra al nostro fiorista capo, si giocherà un ruolo chiave nel trasformare il nostro hotel in un capolavoro fiorente. Sei più di un fiorista – sei un ambasciatore di estetica ed eleganza. La vostra missione: Creative Staging: Prenderai un ruolo di primo piano nell'intero design floreale—dall'allestimento di tavoli delicati a grandi mazzi imponenti per le nostre suite più esclusive. Eventi: Mostra le tue abilità nel design floreale su larga scala durante matrimoni glamour, serate di gala, e grandi progetti stagionali (come il nostro leggendario Natale e New Year's Eve decorazioni). Data di inizio: 1 giugno, 2026 Questo e' il tuo libro. Hai una formazione professionale completa come fiorista e esperienza professionale iniziale nel settore. Diventa parte di un team che valorizza la vera artigianalità, incoraggia l'iniziativa e prospera in una cultura del rispetto reciproco e dello spirito di squadra. Sei pronto a far fiorire il Kulm?
